item.title: 多轮攻击攻破AI模型的概率高达88%——单轮测试完全遗漏风险，思科AI安全负责人在VB Transform 2026发出警告
item.summary: When Cisco ran 6,986 multi-turn attacks against 15 flagship models, attackers who adapted across the conversation broke through as often as 88.3% of the time. Amy Chang, Cisco's head of AI threat intelligence and security research, brought that finding to the agentic security panel at VB Transform 2026; the number shou
